check_box.label: Enable hitmarker
check_box.tool_tip: Flash a marker and play a sound when your combat damage lands (Combat 2.0 regions, via the LSL bridge)

check_box.label: Ignore collision and fall damage
check_box.tool_tip: Skip generic Second Life physics damage (bumps, falls) so only scripted combat damage flashes a hitmarker

check_box.label: Custom crosshair (dot and arrows)
check_box.tool_tip: Replace the stock mouselook/OTS crosshair with the custom composite crosshair

check_box.label: Color crosshair by identified target
check_box.tool_tip: Tint the custom crosshair with the contact set / group color of the avatar under it (requires combat features)

check_box.label: Line-of-sight (LOS) dot in OTS
check_box.tool_tip: Slide the center dot to where a shot fired from your avatar actually lands; the chevrons stay on the camera ray. Centered when your line of sight to the target is clear, and rides onto whatever is blocking the shot.

slider.label: Size:
slider.tool_tip: Scale for the hitmarker, crosshair, and hit report text

check_box.label: Show hit report text
check_box.tool_tip: Fading text under the crosshair describing your hit

slider.label: Text size:
slider.tool_tip: Hit report text scale, independent of the marker size

check_box.label: Show damage type symbol
check_box.tool_tip: Damage type symbol in the hit report

button.name: customize_symbols_btn
button.label: Customize...
button.tool_tip: Assign your own symbol per damage type

slider.label: Volume:
slider.tool_tip: Volume of the hit and kill sounds

line_editor.name: hit_sound_uuid
line_editor.tool_tip: Sound UUID played when your damage lands

line_editor.name: kill_sound_uuid
line_editor.tool_tip: Sound UUID played when your damage kills

button.name: test_hit_sound_btn
button.label: Test hit sound
button.tool_tip: Play the hit sound at the current volume

button.name: test_kill_sound_btn
button.label: Test kill sound
button.tool_tip: Play the kill sound at the current volume
